Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that start with Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation followed by SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are eventually followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed occurrences
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that eventually reach SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed appears at least once
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are not followed by Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases where 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist' does not happen

Name: Ratio of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded occurrences
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' occurs

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that precede Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants with performance duration above the median
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that occur before any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity != 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are part of variants leading to a revision decision (SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'"}"

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that occur in cases eventually resulting in SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit or SW-EIC Reject
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'"}"
